title: State of Wisconsin Policies on Printing and Photocopying
body: Please visit the Purchasing Services (Business Services) webpage on Printing Related and Printing Purchases for policy and instructions. The UW allows printing $49.99 and below to be purchased using the convenience of the purchaser.  Otherwise, all printing must be completed by a campus printing or copy center. Digital Publishing and Printing Services (DPPS) is the large UW printing facility.  If a job needs to be bid out, then DPPS will do the bidding if they can not satisfy the request. Poster printing needed in another location is not exempt from this. Rolled posters could be carried on a plane.  Formcore posters can be bid in the city that you need it. E-mail printing@doit.wisc.edu or call 608-262-3461 between 7:45 and 4:15 to start your order.  If there are 3 vendors in your out of town city, please provide them to speed up the process. Do not wait until the last minute because the bid process could take a little longer. Contact Michele Gundrum for questions related to printing.
